description: Direct restaurant endorsement featuring venue name, location tag, and personal dining experience with specific menu highlights and quality assessment.
structural_recipe: Lead with restaurant/venue name and clear location marker (📍). Tag the establishment. Share personal experience using Arabic descriptive language emphasizing uniqueness, atmosphere, or specific menu items. Include what to try (breakfasts, mains, beverages, pastries). Use casual tone with heart/appreciation emojis. Mention why it's worth visiting (change from routine, quality, ambiance, specialty offerings).
why_it_works: Saudi Instagram culture heavily emphasizes trusted peer recommendations and authentic experiences. Restaurant recommendations leveraging local markers (Al Diriyah, Tahlia Street) and personal narrative build credibility. Specific menu details and honest assessments drive engagement from followers seeking vetted dining destinations. Arabic-language enthusiasm signals genuine experience rather than sponsored content.
transplantation_caveats: Requires authentic personal dining experience—sponsored content performs poorly without disclosure
Location specificity important for Saudi audience; generic recommendations underperform
Mix of Arabic and English acceptable but Arabic must dominate for highest engagement
Venue must align with Saudi dining culture and halal certification expectations
cultural_constraints: Must respect halal and Islamic dining norms
Female-only spaces or mixed venues require appropriate context
